# Layer 2 — Word-for-Word Interlinear Gloss
## 2 Peter, Chapter 1

**Role:** Mechanical word-for-word gloss — Greek word order preserved exactly
**Source:** Layer 1 (SBLGNT text + N1904 morphological data)
**Generated by:** Claude (Executive Director, direct generation)
**Date:** 2026-03-19

---

> **Layer 2 Integrity Rule:** Preserve Greek word order exactly. No reordering for English. No grammatical smoothing. No interpretation.
> Mark hapax with [NT-HAPAX]. Mark textual variants with VARIANT. Mark ambiguous lexemes with (ALT: gloss).

---

**Format:** `Greek-word = English-gloss[morphology-notation]`

**Morphology abbreviation key:**
- Nouns/Adj/Art/Pron: case-number-gender (e.g., nom-sg-m = nominative singular masculine)
- Verbs: tense-voice-mood-person-number (e.g., aor-act-ind-3sg = aorist active indicative 3rd singular)
- Participles: tense-voice-ptcp-case-number-gender
- Infinitives: tense-voice-inf

---

## v.9

SIGNIFICANT LEXICAL VARIANT: SBLGNT reads hamartematon (Str. 265, hamartema = individual sinful acts); N1904/NA28 read hamartion (Str. 266, hamartia = sin/sins). Two distinct Greek words.

| Greek | Gloss | Morphology |
|---|---|---|
| ho | to-whom (ALT: in-whom) | relative-pronoun-dat-sg-m |
| gar | for | conjunction |
| me | not | negative-particle |
| parestin | are-present | verb-pres-act-ind-3sg |
| tauta | these-things | demonstrative-pronoun-nom-pl-n |
| tuphlos | blind | adj-nom-sg-m |
| estin | is | verb-pres-act-ind-3sg |
| muopazon | being-nearsighted (ALT: squinting) | verb-pres-act-ptcp-nom-sg-m [NT-HAPAX] |
| lethen | forgetfulness (ALT: oblivion) | noun-acc-sg-f |
| labon | having-taken | verb-2aor-act-ptcp-nom-sg-m |
| tou | of-the | article-gen-sg-m |
| katharismou | of-cleansing (ALT: of-purification) | noun-gen-sg-m |
| ton | of-the | article-gen-pl-f |
| palai | formerly (ALT: long-ago/of-old) | adverb |
| autou | of-him (ALT: his) | pronoun-gen-sg-m |
| hamartion | of-sins [N1904/NA28; Str. 266 hamartia] | noun-gen-pl-f |

> LEXICAL VARIANT v.9: SBLGNT hamartematon = of-sinful-acts [noun-gen-pl-n; Str. 265 hamartema, individual acts]. N1904/NA28 hamartion = of-sins [Str. 266 hamartia]. All downstream layers must adjudicate.

| phosphoros | morning-star (ALT: light-bearer) | noun/adj-nom-sg-m [NT-HAPAX] |
| anateile | rises (ALT: rises-up) | verb-aor-act-subj-3sg |
| en | in | preposition |
| tais | the | article-dat-pl-f |
| kardiais | hearts | noun-dat-pl-f |
| humon | of-you | pronoun-2nd-gen-pl |

## v.20

| Greek | Gloss | Morphology |
|---|---|---|
| touto | this | demonstrative-pronoun-acc-sg-n |
| proton | first (ALT: above-all) | adverb-superlative |
| ginoskontes | knowing | verb-pres-act-ptcp-nom-pl-m |
| hoti | that | conjunction-declarative |
| pasa | every (ALT: all) | adj-nom-sg-f |

## v.21

VARIANT: some MSS have pote propheteia (adverb first); SBLGNT/N1904/NA28 read propheteia pote
SIGNIFICANT VARIANT: SBLGNT/NA28 read apo Theou anthropoi (men from God); some MSS p72 and B read hagioi Theou (holy-ones of-God) without apo
NOTE: phero echo 3 — both enechthe (aorist passive indicative) and pheromenoi (present passive participle) from phero, completing the threefold literary echo of vv.17-21

| Greek | Gloss | Morphology |
|---|---|---|
| ou | not | negative-particle |
| gar | for | conjunction-explanatory |
| thelemati | by-will (ALT: by-desire) | noun-dat-sg-n |
| anthropou | of-man (ALT: of-human) | noun-gen-sg-m |
| enechthe | was-borne (ALT: was-carried) | verb-aor-pass-ind-3sg [phero echo 3a] |
| propheteia | prophecy | noun-nom-sg-f [VARIANT: some MSS: pote propheteia] |
| pote | ever (ALT: at-any-time) | particle |
| alla | but | conjunction-adversative |
| hupo | by | preposition-agent |
| Pneumatos | of-Spirit | noun-gen-sg-n |
| Hagiou | holy | adj-gen-sg-n |
| pheromenoi | being-borne-along (ALT: being-carried) | verb-pres-pass-ptcp-nom-pl-m [phero echo 3b — present tense: ongoing continuous action] |
| elalesen | they-spoke | verb-aor-act-ind-3pl |
| apo | from | preposition [VARIANT: p72 B omit apo; read hagioi Theou = holy-ones of-God] |
| Theou | God | noun-gen-sg-m |
| anthropoi | men (ALT: humans/people) | noun-nom-pl-m |

| Verse | Greek Term | Gloss Used |

| 1 | isotimos | equal-in-honor |
| 9 | muopazo | being-nearsighted |
| 17 | megaloprepous | magnificent |
| 19 | auchmeros | dark |
| 19 | phosphoros | morning-star |
| 20 | epilusis | of-interpretation |

### Textual Variants Marked
| Verse | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | MS reading | Simeon vs. Simon |
| 3 | Article | ta panta (N1904) vs. panta (SBLGNT) |
| 3 | Case/reading | idia doxe (dative) vs. dia doxes (genitive) |
| 4 | Word order | timia kai megista hemin — MS variation |
| 4 | Article | to kosmo vs. kosmo (article omitted in some MSS) |
| 9 | LEXICAL | hamartematon (SBLGNT, Str.265) vs. hamartion (N1904, Str.266) — two distinct Greek words |
| 12 | Reading | melleso vs. ouk ameleso — completely different word in some MSS |
| 17 | Word order | Transfiguration quotation order varies vs. Synoptics |
| 21 | Word order | propheteia pote vs. pote propheteia |
| 21 | SIGNIFICANT READING | apo Theou anthropoi (SBLGNT/NA28) vs. hagioi Theou (p72, B) |

### ALT Glosses Requiring Layer 3 Decision
| Verse | Term | Options |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | doulos | slave / servant |
| 2 | epignosis | full-knowledge / precise-knowledge |
| 3 | arete | virtue / excellence / moral-excellence |
| 9 | lethen labon | having-taken-forgetfulness [Greek idiom — Layer 3 must normalize to English idiom] |
| 12 | melleso | I-am-about / I-intend |
| 16 | epoptai | eyewitnesses / highest-grade-initiates |
| 16 | parousian | coming / arrival / presence |
| 19 | bebaioheron | more-sure / more-reliable / confirmed |
| 20 | idias epiluseos ou ginetai | [INTERP-RISK crux: authorial sense (prophet did not originate his own prophecy) vs. readerly sense (no private interpretation); Layer 3 must flag] |
